login.title: Admin Login
login.accountLocked: Account locked. Please reset your password.
login.notAdmin: Please switch to the admin account to manage users!
login.ipLocked: Too many login attempts from this IP. Please try again in {{min}} minutes.

passwd.ipLocked: This IP has been locked due to too many incorrect key attempts. Unlock time: {{time}}
passwd.resetKeyNotConfigured: Reset key not configured: Please generate a key hash for this user in User Management.
passwd.keyTooManyAttempts: Too many incorrect key attempts. This IP has been locked for 24 hours.
passwd.resetSuccess: Password reset successful. Please log in with your new password.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.collectionSearchHint: Search, filter and manage collections. Drag cards to reorder.
dashboard.sortBeforeClear: Clear filters before reordering to avoid missing hidden collections.
dashboard.noMatch: No collections match the current search or filter criteria.
dashboard.swapDragHint: * Drag thumbnails to swap left/right order
dashboard.confirmChangeIndexImage: Are you sure you want to change the index image?
dashboard.uploadFailedSize: Upload failed: Single file cannot exceed 300MB.
dashboard.indexImageOnly: Index image only supports image formats.
dashboard.videoProcessingFailed: Video processing failed: Please confirm ffmpeg and ffprobe are installed on the server.
dashboard.toggleCreditHint: Toggle short signature visibility in hidden info page
dashboard.confirmEnableCreditNeedsHideInfo: Enabling "Show Credit" requires "Hide Info" to be enabled first. Continue?
dashboard.confirmEnableAccessBlockedNeedsHideEntry: Enabling "Block Access" requires "Hide Entry" to be enabled first. Continue?
dashboard.confirmShowEntryWithAccessBlocked: "Block Access" is currently enabled. Also enable "Show Entry"?
dashboard.confirmShowInfoWithShowCredit: "Show Credit" is currently enabled. Also enable "Show Info"?
dashboard.confirmDeleteCollection: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? This will delete the collection and all its media, and cannot be undone.
dashboard.clearFiltersBeforeDrag: Please clear search and filters before drag-sorting.
dashboard.clearFiltersBeforeSaveOrder: Please clear search and filters before saving order to avoid missing hidden collections.
dashboard.allowAccessHint: Restore access to this collection via URL
dashboard.blockAccessHint: Block access to this collection via URL
dashboard.showCreditHint: Show short signature in hidden info page
dashboard.hideCreditHint: Hide short signature in hidden info page
dashboard.needTwoIndexImages: Please set two index images first

collectionDetail.sortBeforeClearMedia: Clear filters before reordering to avoid missing hidden media.
collectionDetail.enteredManageMode: Entered manage mode. Click media to toggle delete status.
collectionDetail.noMatchMedia: No media match the current search or filter criteria.
collectionDetail.uploadMediaHint: Supports image and video uploads. Uploaded files enter draft first, and will be displayed on the public site only after publishing.
collectionDetail.collectionReportHint: This description will be saved as a draft first, and displayed on the public site after clicking "Publish Updates". Individual media descriptions can be edited below.
collectionDetail.reportPlaceholder: Enter description here. Markdown is supported.
collectionDetail.draftUpdatesHint: Media uploads, reordering, description edits and deletions are saved as drafts first. Click "Publish Updates" to sync to the public site.
collectionDetail.addedToPendingDelete: Added to pending deletion list, will be deleted after publishing
collectionDetail.clearFiltersBeforeSave: Please clear search and filters before saving order to avoid missing hidden media.
collectionDetail.confirmGenerateKey: The key can only be generated once and cannot be modified. Confirm generation?
collectionDetail.selectMediaFiles: Please select media files to upload.
collectionDetail.videoProcessingFailed: Video processing failed: Please confirm ffmpeg and ffprobe are installed on the server.
collectionDetail.detectingChange: Detected change, preparing to auto-save draft...
collectionDetail.clearFiltersBeforeDrag: Please clear search and filters before drag-sorting.
collectionDetail.clearFiltersBeforeSaveOrder: Please clear search and filters before saving order to avoid missing hidden media.
collectionDetail.confirmDeleteCollection: Are you sure you want to delete this collection? This will delete the collection and all its media, and cannot be undone.
collectionDetail.blockLayoutHint: Drag to reorder blocks, controlling the public page layout; text blocks can be added multiple times, media blocks only available in report mode
collectionDetail.contentLayoutHint: Drag to reorder media and text blocks, controlling the public page layout; save changes then publish to update the public page
collectionDetail.mediaManagementHint: Upload images or videos, drag to reorder
collectionDetail.confirmDeleteBlock: Are you sure you want to delete this block?

settings.title: System Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage website display content and basic information
settings.siteNameHint: Displayed in the page Logo and browser title
settings.siteTitleHint: Title displayed in the browser tab
settings.fullSignatureHint: Signature text displayed in the footer under "Show Info" mode
settings.shortSignatureHint: Text displayed in the footer under "Hide Info + Show Short Signature" mode
settings.icpNumberHint: ICP filing number text displayed in the footer. Leave empty to hide.
settings.icpLinkHint: URL to navigate to when clicking the filing number
settings.socialLinksHint: Social links displayed in the footer under "Show Info" mode. Keep at least one.
settings.mediaConfigHint: Image and video compression parameters. Takes effect immediately after saving (no restart required).
settings.videoCrfHint: Constant Rate Factor. Lower values mean higher quality and larger files.
settings.videoPresetHint: Trade-off between encoding speed and compression efficiency. Slower presets yield better compression.
settings.languageHint: Language for the admin interface. Takes effect immediately after saving.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage system users, passwords and key reset functions
users.confirmGenerateKey: The key can only be generated once and cannot be modified. Confirm generation?
users.generateKeyHint: Enter a key to generate a hash value. Once configured, the user can reset their password using this key. The key can only be generated once and cannot be modified. Please remember it.
users.keyGenerated: Key has been generated and saved. Please confirm the key below. It cannot be viewed again after closing.
users.confirmClearKey: Are you sure you want to clear the key for user "{{name}}"? After clearing, the user will not be able to reset their password using the key, and the key cannot be recovered.
users.confirmDeleteUser: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.passwordMismatch: The two passwords entered do not match
users.keyMismatch: The three entered keys do not match
users.newPasswordMismatch: The two new passwords entered do not match
users.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
users.cannotDeleteDefaultAdmin: Default admin user cannot be deleted
users.keyAlreadyConfigured: Key already configured. If you forgot the key, please clear the reset_key_hash in the database.
users.userNoKey: This user has no key configured

collectionCard.newCollectionHint: * New collections have hidden entry by default. After adding, go to "Media Management" to upload images or videos, and manually show the entry when ready.
